codeReview.summary: The follow-up fix closes the remaining translation gap from `fix-i18n-persistence-and-coverage`: the dialog group labels and shared close control now read from locale keys, and the previously flagged English noun `skills` has been removed from the two Chinese Settings descriptions.

summary: Pass. Commit `472e874` resolves the remaining ui-overhaul i18n blockers by routing the last hardcoded accessibility labels through `t()` and normalizing the flagged Chinese glossary entries.
